sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n45825" key="e)forate/on" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἐφορ-ᾱτέον</orth>, <sense id="n45825.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">one must observe</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg2043.tlg001:3:4" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Heph.Astr.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">3.4</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
